Crimson dragon folds wings tight, plummeting through dawn mist toward a mountain goat, air screaming past angular scales, ground rushing closer.
Massive emerald dragon banks hard left over a glacial river, wingtip carving through water surface, sending spray arcing into sunlight.
Black-scaled dragon erupts from sea cliff face, wings snapping open with thunderous crack, sending boulders tumbling into churning waves below.
Silver dragon skims endless golden grassland at blistering speed, wake of bent grass spreading behind like ripples, dust devils spiraling upward.
Azure dragon climbs through violent thunderstorm, each powerful wingbeat fighting wind, rain streaming horizontally off ridged spine, lightning illuminating silhouette.
Amber dragon threads narrow sandstone canyon at full speed, wingtips missing red rock walls by inches, echo of passage rumbling.
White dragon bursts upward through thick cloud layer, mist exploding outward in perfect ring, sun blazing off ice-blue wing membranes.
Copper dragon spirals lazily upward on thermal current above volcanic caldera, wings outstretched and motionless, surveying smoking landscape rotating below.
Two scarred dragons lock claws midair, tumbling earthward in violent spiral, tails whipping, fire gouts crossing, neither releasing hold.
Obsidian dragon swoops low beneath ancient stone bridge, belly nearly scraping moss-covered arch, emerging into shadowed gorge beyond at speed.
Golden dragon flares wings wide for landing impact, talons extended forward, dust and loose stones exploding outward in massive cloud.
Slate-gray dragon glides silently through midnight forest, moonlight catching wing edges, glowing eyes fixed downward, searching between shadowed pines.
Jade dragon races along ocean surface, wingtips kissing wave crests, twin spray trails marking passage, startled seabirds scattering in panic.
Rust-colored dragon dives vertically through desert noon heat shimmer, wings tucked aerodynamic, targeting jackrabbit frozen in terror on sand.
Violet dragon corkscrews through morning fog in coastal cliffs, vapor streaming off rotating body, distant seal colony's barking erupting below.
Charcoal dragon powers upward through ash column from active volcano, wings stroking hard against super-heated updraft, embers swirling in vortex.
Teal dragon skims frozen tundra surface, belly scales nearly touching snow, powder exploding upward in continuous white wake behind.
Bronze dragon pulls out of dive at last second above kelp forest, wing-wind flattening sea surface, seized shark thrashing in claws.
Scarlet dragon rolls inverted through narrow mountain pass, navigating by wingtip proximity to stone walls blurring past on both sides.
Moss-green dragon crashes through rainforest canopy in pursuit, branches shattering, leaves exploding in green storm, prey fleeing below.
Ivory dragon brakes hard midair above arctic ice sheet, wings cupped vertical, momentum bleeding off, body tilting tail-down for perch.
Burgundy dragon side-slips through gap between two ruined city towers, adjusting wing angles constantly, crumbling masonry marking narrow passage.
Pewter dragon hammers wings against headwind over storm-tossed ocean, each stroke visible as depression in wave surface below, rain obscuring vision.
Ochre dragon pursues fleeing elk through autumn forest, weaving between tree trunks at dangerous speed, shoulder clipping bark from ancient oak.
Indigo dragon transitions from water to air, exploding upward from lake surface, cascades streaming from body, fish clutched in rear talons.
